description: Advance Orion Agent from runtime refactor into platform-layer hardening with standardized tool metadata, citation mapping, session storage boundaries, and governed memory/profile flows.

userStories.title: Harden ToolPool Metadata and Permission Pipeline
userStories.description: As a platform maintainer, I want tool metadata to drive permission, timeout, retry, and frontend display behavior so future tool expansion does not rely on scattered hard-coded rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool definitions expose stable metadata for category, display labels, permission level, timeout, and retry behavior
The main runtime path reads tool metadata from one source of truth rather than scattered literals
Frontend-facing tool details remain compatible or are improved without breaking current pages
Add or update backend tests for tool metadata and permission behavior
Run the matching backend unittest modules and frontend build if touched

userStories.title: Standardize Backend CitationMap
userStories.description: As a product maintainer, I want paragraph-to-source mapping to be standardized in the backend so the frontend can render anchors and source hints without guessing relationships.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend citation mapping covers paragraph anchors, source labels, and source kinds from one typed structure
Current memory, profile, session message, and source summary citations remain supported
Frontend consumers can keep using a stable citation payload with less UI-side inference
Add or update tests for citation source registration and paragraph mapping
Run matching backend unittest modules and frontend build if touched

userStories.title: Extract SessionStore Boundary
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want session creation, summary refresh, branch continuation, and trace lookup to live behind a session store boundary so conversation governance is easier to evolve safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Introduce a dedicated session store or equivalent boundary for session persistence and retrieval flows
runtime_agent delegates key session operations through the new boundary
Existing session APIs remain compatible
Add focused unit coverage for session branching, summary refresh, and task linkage behavior
Run the relevant backend unittest modules

userStories.title: Layer Context Contracts and Trace Metadata
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want context layers to expose explicit source and budget trace metadata so debugging, recovery, and frontend explanation can rely on structured contracts instead of implicit strings.
acceptanceCriteria: Context-related structures expose clearer source and budget metadata beyond plain assembled text
Context build notes and trace fields remain compatible with the current runtime and UI
At least the main runtime and execution-node path consume the structured context trace fields
Add or update backend tests for context trace and budget output
Run the relevant backend unittest modules

userStories.title: Strengthen Memory and Profile Governance
userStories.description: As a product maintainer, I want memory and profile records to expose stronger governance signals so recall quality, editing, traceability, and future multi-user isolation can evolve on a cleaner foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: Memory and profile models expose clearer governance-oriented fields or boundaries needed by current flows
Recall and profile injection behavior do not regress
Editing and traceability surfaces remain intact or improve
Add or update backend tests for governed memory/profile behaviors
Run the matching backend unittest modules and frontend build if touched
